title: Daydream / Make a Budget and Stick to It
overview: Sakamaki offers to take Nakajima to a certain place for lunch. / Mitsuko had been shopping excessively in order to relieve the stress she was feeling from work.

title: Hot Spring Eccentricity / Fantasy Company
overview: Kihara stops by a hot spring and runs into Moguro. / Deyashiro ends up quitting his job and starts going to the Fantasy Company through a referral by Moguro.

title: Bento Wars / Ah, My Beloved 583-Type
overview: Amae Masao has his mother make him a bento every day, but he was actually switching that bento with his girlfriend in secret. / Kamera Tetsuya’s work life and hobbies aren’t going very well lately, so Moguro pulls some strings and allows him to ride the 583-Type that he had so many fond memories on.

title: The Woman on the Platform / Runners' Paradise
overview: Naoki Junichi is in love with a woman he’d always see at the train station platform so Moguro tells him that he’ll bring the two together. / Michihara Kakeru had been running to relieve stress from his job. However, there have been a lot more runners lately and it was getting a bit crowded.

title: Sunday Club / The Woman Who Throws Away
overview: Uchinaki talks about his depression concerning work, which leads to Moguro leading him to a dream-like place. / Monomochi Tomie is living the dream with the perfect home and perfect family, however her heart still seemed empty.

title: I'll Lease This Monster / Tonight's Another Awesome Night
overview: When Udo ends up attracting more attention than the lead actor, he is fired from his role as a passerby. / Doraki is quite the night owl and his schedule had been becoming completely opposite than his girlfriend’s and it was troubling him.

title: The Man Who Transformed / The Rule of Mommy Friends
overview: Isobe has a perfect home life, but he still felt like something was missing. He runs into Moguro and realizes that he wants a life with a little more intensity... / Shizuoka Nozomi is a part of a mommy friend group, and just like the others, never argues with the head member Oniyo.

title: The Man Chased by His Dreams / Mustache Taxi
overview: Yumemi Ashi meets Moguro and opens up about his troubles. He then receives a special candy that lets him control his dreams. / Taxi driver, Yowagoshi, is too meek to deal with rowdy customers and is troubled.

title: The Nostalgic Bathhouse Tour / The Researcher's Melancholy
overview: Bandai Mamoru has a hobby of admiring bathhouse paintings. / Towani works as a university researcher, but he gets his research stolen by his ex-girlfriend.

title: The Person in the Acquired Film / Fake Grandchild
overview: Tayori ends up with some developed film that doesn’t belong to him, and falls in love with the woman in the pictures. / Oite Kazuhito comes back home with divorce papers waiting for him. After that, he lives a lonely life, unable to see his granddaughter.

title: Destructive Tendencies / I'm an Idol
overview: Ochiiri has a great home and loving wife. He lives a life that everyone would be envious of, but he had a problem that he couldn’t mention to anyone. / Mamano Ari works hard to make her daughter’s dream of becoming a top idol come true.

title: The King of the Chat Room / Japan Overseas Trip
overview: Amikumo Tsuyoshi enjoys chatting with people he doesn’t know online, but ends up in an argument with one of the random people. / Chikako wants to go on a vacation someday, but her stingy nature has prevented her from doing so.
